あの……しれーかん、いつもお疲れ様です……。<br>あ、あの……これ、受け取って:
Um... Commander... you always work so hard... Ah, um... could you...
accept this...?
これ、ヒマリが編んだ……マフラー……。<br>わたし、おばあちゃんに編み物を習っ:
This is a scarf... I knitted it... I learned to knit from my grandmother,
so...
こっちの世界じゃ道具や素材は揃えられないかと思ってたけど、<br>前線基地のみん:
I thought I wouldn't be able to get the tools or materials in this
world, but everyone at the Frontline Base helped me...
武器屋さんが、編み棒を作ってくれたり、<br>旅商人の方が、貴重な毛糸を分けてく:
The weapon shop owner made me some knitting needles, and a
traveling merchant shared precious yarn with me...
これは、みんなの優しさが詰まったマフラー……。<br>だから、しれーかん、首に巻:
This scarf is filled with everyone's kindness... So, Commander, when
you wear it, I'm sure it'll keep you warm...?
